content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2339
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886


September 25, 2012


Jonady Hum Sun, Staff Counsel
Public Utilities Commission
505 Van Ness Avenue
San Francisco, CA 94102-3298

Re:     Your Request for Advice
        Our File No. W-12-107

Dear Ms. Sun:

        This letter confirms that you have withdrawn your request for advice.

        If you have other questions on this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

                                                Sincerely,

                                                Zackery P. Morazzini
                                                General Counsel

                                        By: Valentina Joyce
                                            Counsel, Legal Division

VJ:jgl

embedding.qa_text: The letter is from the Fair Political Practices Commission to Jonady Hum Sun, Staff Counsel at the Public Utilities Commission. It confirms that Ms. Sun has withdrawn her request for advice and provides contact information if she has other questions. The letter is signed by Zackery P. Morazzini, General Counsel, and Valentina Joyce, Counsel, Legal Division.
